message:
fix(freelist,core): bounds-validate freelist pages and chunk INSERT...SELECT fallback

Two fixes for bugs reported in Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#186:

1. Freelist bounds validation (fsqlite-btree):
   - allocate() now skips freelist entries that reference pages beyond
     db_page_count, preventing "freelist leaf page N exceeds db_size M"
     corruption errors on databases with stale freelist state
   - deallocate() rejects pages beyond db_page_count to prevent writing
     corrupt freelist entries on flush

2. Chunked INSERT...SELECT materialization (fsqlite-core):
   - When the streaming INSERT...SELECT path cannot handle a query (CTEs,
     complex joins), the materialized fallback now processes in chunks of
     10,000 rows via injected LIMIT/OFFSET instead of loading the entire
     result set into memory
   - Prevents OOM on large corpora (reported: 870k messages, 6.3GB DB
     causing 11GB RSS before crash)
   - SELECTs that already have a LIMIT clause are left unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
